title: Loud Alerts

posts.author: Talco (tal cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
I use Monday in order to gather events that arrive in the organization’s mailbox in a board, these events happen once a day or two. The importance of these events is very high, but our control room cannot afford to leave a permanent open window on of the table in they screen.
Is there a way through Monday itself or through some kind of integration to make Monday send a loud notification for these events specifically (different from normal Monday notifications sound) through the browser or through the app, this is so that we can trust the board we use with high certainty.
Thanks a lot!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tal! This isn’t possible natively in monday but it might be worth looking into an app that can add its own notification sounds and seeing if you can connect it via zapier.com or make.com to monday!

Hopefully, some other community members have done this and can contribute here!
